events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.85,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Forms assembled and braced but release agent (form oil) not applied prior to concrete placement",
    "Missing bond-breaker creates risk of concrete adhesion to form faces, surface defects, and difficult stripping"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Apply engineered form release agent to all form faces in contact with concrete per ACI 347 and project specs",
    "Verify form oil compatibility with concrete mix and any subsequent surface treatments",
    "Inspect brace points and form geometry after oiling to confirm no displacement or contamination of rebar",
    "Hold concrete pour until form oiling is complete and inspected"
  ],
  "rationale": "Forms are roughed-in at approximately 70 percent, but the absence of form release agent is a non-compliant defect under ACI 347 guidance for proper form preparation. Placing concrete without a bond-breaker risks surface defects and stripping damage. Work must fail until the defect is corrected.",
  "references": ["ACI 347"]
}
